# seerr_media (Data Source)

Read Seerr media records via `/api/v1/media`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_media" "available" {
  filter = "available"
  sort   = "mediaAdded"
  take   = 50
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Optional media status filter: `available`, `partial`, `allavailable`, `processing`, or `pending`.
- `skip` (Number)
- `sort` (String) Optional media sort: `modified` or `mediaAdded`.
- `take` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `page_info_json` (String)
- `response_json` (String)
- `results_json` (String)
